pg64-p1-s2:
Though our decision was a vital and crucial step, it could have little permanent
effect unless at once followed by a strenuous effort to face, and to be rid of, the things in ourselves which had been
blocking us.
pg64-p1-s3: Our liquor was but a symptom.
pg64-p1-s4: So we had to get down to causes and conditions.
pg64-p1:
which many of us had never attempted. Though our decision was a vital and crucial step, it could have little permanent
effect unless at once followed by a strenuous effort to face, and to be rid of, the things in ourselves which had been
blocking us. Our liquor was but a symptom. So we had to get down to causes and conditions.
pg64-p2-s1: Therefore, we started upon a personal inventory. This was Step Four.
pg64-p2-s2:
A business which takes no regular inventory
usually goes broke.
pg64-p2-s3: Taking a commercial inventory is a fact-finding and a fact-facing process.
pg64-p2-s4:
It is an effort to
discover the truth about the stock-in-trade.
pg64-p2-s5:
One object is to disclose damaged or unsalable goods, to get rid of them
promptly and without regret.
pg64-p2-s6: If the owner of the business is to be successful, he cannot fool himself about values.
pg64-p2:
Therefore, we started upon a personal inventory. This was Step Four. A business which takes no regular inventory
usually goes broke. Taking a commercial inventory is a fact-finding and a fact-facing process. It is an effort to
discover the truth about the stock-in-trade. One object is to disclose damaged or unsalable goods, to get rid of them
promptly and without regret. If the owner of the business is to be successful, he cannot fool himself about values.
pg64-p3-s1: We did exactly the same thing with our lives.
pg64-p3-s3:
First, we searched out the flaws in our make-up
which caused our failure.
pg64-p3-s4:
Being convinced that self, manifested in various ways, was what had defeated us, we considered
its common manifestations.
pg64-p3:
We did exactly the same thing with our lives. We took stock honestly. First, we searched out the flaws in our make-up
which caused our failure. Being convinced that self, manifested in various ways, was what had defeated us, we considered
its common manifestations.
pg64-p4-s2: It destroys more alcoholics than anything else.
pg64-p4-s3:
From it stem all forms of
spiritual disease, for we have been not only mentally and physically ill, we have been spiritually sick.
pg64-p4-s4:
When the
spiritual malady is overcome, we straighten out mentally and physically.
pg64-p4-s5:
In dealing with resentments, we set them on
paper.
pg64-p4-s6: We listed people, institutions or principles with whom we were angry.
pg64-p4-s7: We asked ourselves why we were angry.
pg64-p4-s8:
In
most cases it was found that our self-esteem, our pocketbooks, our ambitions, our personal relationships
pg64-p4:
Resentment is the "number one" offender. It destroys more alcoholics than anything else. From it stem all forms of
spiritual disease, for we have been not only mentally and physically ill, we have been spiritually sick. When the
spiritual malady is overcome, we straighten out mentally and physically. In dealing with resentments, we set them on
paper. We listed people, institutions or principles with whom we were angry. We asked ourselves why we were angry. In
most cases it was found that our self-esteem, our pocketbooks, our ambitions, our personal relationships
